description_long: This is a small, lifelike bird with a streamlined body and a slightly rounded head. Its plumage is primarily a rich brown on the upper body, transitioning to darker, almost blackish tones on the wings and tail. The beak is slender, straight, and pointed, well-suited for probing or picking. The legs and feet are thin and appear dark, with visible claws. The tail is relatively short and appears slightly rounded at the tip. The overall appearance suggests a bird commonly found in urban parks or gardens, blending well with natural surroundings.
description: A small brown bird with a slender pointed beak, dark wings, and a slightly rounded tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's brown upper body, dark wings, and slender beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail shape and the alignment of the legs and feet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the wing and tail feathers.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the beak, head shape, and chest coloration.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid brown head with darker, nearly black wings and tail; subtle gradient between body and wing colors.
